tipRules.tip: Robertson: Use a Strike King 5XD in Blue and Chartreuse on post-spawn points at bay mouths on Kentucky Lake.
Robertson: Texas-rig a Strike King Bullworm in green pumpkin to catch post-spawn largemouth around creek mouths when schools are scattered from high water.

knowledge.insight: Robertson: High water busts up schools of post-spawn bass. Keep an open mind, don't get stuck on previous spots, and be willing to search for new fish.
